popularStory.headline: Amédée II de Savoie (1050-1080)
popularStory.description: Amédée II de Maurienne ou dit plus couramment Amédée II de Savoie, né vers 1050, probablement au château de Charbonnières et mort vers 1080, est le cinquième comte en Maurienne, également seigneur du …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Amédée II de Savoie於1048年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊時，他的父親Count Oddone di Savoia28歲，母親Adelaide di Susa34歲。他於1065年與Jeanne de Genève結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1080年1月26日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛享年32歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉讓安-德-莫瑞安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amédée II de Savoie于1048年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊时，他的父亲Count Oddone di Savoia28岁，母亲Adelaide di Susa34岁。他于1065年与Jeanne de Genève结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1080年1月26日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛享年32岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉讓安-德-莫瑞安。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Amédée
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Late Latin Amadeus ‘love God’, translating German Gottlieb; a royal name in the house of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Amédée II de Savoie was born in 1048, in Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Count Oddone di Savoia, was 28 and his mother, Adelaide di Susa, was 34. He married Jeanne de Genève in 1065. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 26 January 1080, in Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 32, and was buried in Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amédée II de Savoie est né en 1048, à Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Count Oddone di Savoia, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Adelaide di Susa, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Genève en 1065. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 janvier 1080, à Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amédée II de Savoie 1048 in Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Oddone di Savoia 28 und seine Mutter Adelaide di Susa 34. Er hat 1065 Jeanne de Genève geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Januar 1080 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amédée II de Savoie è nato il nel 1048 nel Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Count Oddone di Savoia, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide di Susa, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Genève nel 1065. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 gennaio 1080, nel Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Amédée II de Savoieが1048年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイで生まれた時，父Count Oddone di Savoiaは28歳，母Adelaide di Susaは34歳であった。1065年にJeanne de Genèveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1080年1月26日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンで32歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイサイント-ジェアン-デ-マアウリーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amédée II de Savoie(이)가 1048년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Oddone di Savoia(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide di Susa(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1065년 Jeanne de Genève(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1080년 1월 26일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 로트-트-가니에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 세인트-제이이-데-모리니에 묻혔다.

lv.da 9 luglio 1078 a 26 gennaio 1080: no 1078. gada 9. jūlija līdz 1080. gada 26. janvārim

pt.da 9 luglio 1078 a 26 gennaio 1080: de 9 de julho de 1078 a 26 de janeiro de 1080
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amédée II de Savoie nasceu em 1048, em Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Count Oddone di Savoia, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide di Susa, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Genève em 1065. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1080, em Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amédée II de Savoie родился в 1048 г. в местности савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Count Oddone di Savoia было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide di Susa, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Genève в 1065 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 января 1080 г. в местности лот-ет-гаронн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-джин-де-мауриенн, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amédée II de Savoie nació en 1048, en Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Count Oddone di Savoia, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Adelaide di Susa, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Genève en 1065. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de enero de 1080, en Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
